subcodes.first_line: O thou creator! This pure soul advanced toward Thy Kingdom and humbly lamented and supplicated before Thee. Heretofore he was a captive
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این نفس پاک توجه بملکوت تو نمود و تضرع و زاری کرد تا حال اسیر
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @living waters; water of life
